text: Being here, I feel a blend of curiosity and anticipation. The modern and sterile environment outside the glass hints at a space dedicated to knowledge and order. Inside, the vibrant and visually dynamic display about "R+D"—research and development—invites me to reflect on human innovation, collaboration, and our evolving relationship with technology. There is an energy of progress and thoughtful inquiry in the air, making me eager to explore the ideas presented here.
